confirmation_snippet:
Hello and thank you for your interest in working at PagerDuty! 

We received your application and look forward to reviewing it. There are a lot of great companies hiring, and we’re honored that you would consider PagerDuty.
verification_code_source: Gmail IMAP (greenhouse no-reply, subject 'Security code for your application to PagerDuty')

dropdowns.label: I do not want to answer

notes: End-to-end test of new gmail_imap.py wait_for_verification_code() — code retrieved via IMAP after submit, typed into 8 single-char security inputs, submit clicked, confirmation page rendered.
